messages.content: You are a top-tier web architect and frontend engineer. Generate production-ready single-file HTML applications. Use cyan (#00E5FF) / indigo (#6366F1) color scheme, dark theme (#0A0A1A), responsive design. All CSS and JS inline in one HTML file.

I need two complete HTML files for Correctover product website. Output each file's complete code in a fenced code block with the filename as the language tag.

## SITE 1: correctover.com index.html (Product Landing Page)

Correctover is an LLM API reliability SDK (Verified Failover). Product features:
- 6-dimension contract validation: Schema Validation, Semantic Equivalence, Latency Compliance, Cost Guardrails, Content Integrity, Identity Verification
- Microsecond diagnosis: P50=22µs, P99=47µs (benchmarked 1M samples)
- Circuit breaker: P50=0.4µs (1M samples)
- Telemetry throughput: 177,582 rec/s single-thread
- Telemetry latency: 5.6µs/record
- MAPE-K self-healing loop: Monitor->Analyze->Plan->Execute->Knowledge
- 70,000 fault injections verified across 7 fault types
- One-line install: pip install correctover
- Zero network overhead, in-process SDK
- Size: ~375 KB, 1 dependency (httpx)
- PyPI: 13,769 monthly / 623 daily downloads
- GitHub: 4 stars

Page structure (45-second scroll experience):
1. Hero: Animated particle/grid background, title 'Verified Failover for LLM Applications', subtitle, 'pip install correctover' CTA button
2. Problem: 'HTTP 200 Is Not Enough' - show 4 failure modes with animated cards
3. Solution: 6-dimension contract validation with checkmark animations
4. Benchmark: Live counter from 0 to real values (P50=22, P99=47, 0.4µs, 177K rec/s) with scroll-triggered animation
5. SDK Architecture: MAPE-K loop visual flow diagram
6. Pricing: 4 tiers (Trial Free / Pro $99/mo / Professional $499/mo / Enterprise Custom)
7. CTA: Final call to action with gradient button
8. Footer: Links to docs, GitHub, PyPI, contact

## SITE 2: console.html (Real Data Dashboard)

A live dashboard showing real Correctover SDK benchmarks:
- Diagnosis: P50=22µs, P99=47µs
- Circuit Breaker: P50=0.4µs
- Telemetry Throughput: 177,582 rec/s
- Telemetry Latency: 5.6µs/record
- SDK Size: ~375 KB
- Dependencies: 1 (httpx)
- PyPI Monthly: 13,769
- PyPI Daily: 623
- GitHub Stars: 4
- Fault Injections: 70,000
- System Status: Online indicator with latency bar

Design: Dark theme, cyan/indigo gradients, animated counters, glowing cards, grid background, responsive, Font Awesome icons via CDN.

Output both complete files. Make them visually stunning.
